182 _52BD PRSR_ULCR_DSCHRG_CNT (52Bd) Number of Current Pressure Ulcers: Discharge CHAR 2 The number of pressure ulcers, including ulcers that cannot be accurately staged at the time of discharge.
183 _52CA LRGST_PRSR_ULCR_ADMSN_NUM (52Ca) Length Multiplied by Width: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the largest pressure ulcer's open surface area at the time of admission. 00 = 0 cm, 01 = 0.3 cm, 02 = 0.3 to 0.6 cm, 03 = 0.7 to 1.0 cm, 04 = 1.1 to 2.0 cm, 05 = 2.1 to 3.0 cm, 06 =
